job_title: View job: Scientist 2-Spatial Biology and Biophysics
job_description:
• 3+ years of relevant experience in situ hybridization, imaging and spatial techniques, preferably in the Biotechnology industry.
• Strong analytical background Strong organizational skills.
• Strong written and oral communication skills.
• Strong troubleshooting and problem solving skills.
• Experience with the 10x Genomics Xenium platform is a plus.
• Skills in image analysis are a plus.
• PhD in Molecular Biology, Biophysics, Physical Chemistry or related field.
• Proven ability to design novel molecular biology assay schemes, as evidenced by peer-reviewed publications or published patents.

job_description: • Customer events News & media Who we are Innovation Careers Sustainability Supplying EEO and Affirmative Action.
• Customer events News & media Who we are Innovation Careers Sustainability Supplying EEO and Affirmative Action.

• 📱 Company Mobile Phone: Stay connected with a corporate phone – no need to mix work and personal calls.
• 🎓 Learning & Training: Take advantage of a wide range of learning opportunities grow, upskill, and move forward in your career.
• Collaborate with a team of open-minded, skilled and motivated software engineers in an environment of learning and support.
• Degree in Computer Science, Robotics or a related field3+ years of industry experience in software engineering, robotics or computer visionStrong C++ and Python skills with a passion for high‑quality code, performance, and best practicesExperience with Rust is a plus.
• Willingness to learn is a requirementStrong analytical skills with an interest in statistics and gradient based optimizationBonus points for experience working with systems involving SLAM, computer vision or roboticsDesire and proven capability to work both autonomously and as part of a collaborative global team.
• 🏡 Home Office Flexibility: Work from wherever suits you best thanks to our flexible remote work options.
• 💻 Benefits Platform: Enjoy exclusive deals and discounts on everything from tech to travel through our employee benefits portal.
• 📈 Employee Share Acquisition Plan: Want to invest in your future.
